SourceProxy.name: KalmanTracker
SourceProxy.label: Kalman Tracker

Documentation.short_help: Track detection bounding boxes using KalmanFilter estimation
Documentation.long_help: Track detection bounding boxes using KalmanFilter estimation

SourceProxy.Documentation: A tracker to assign unique ID to bounding boxes accross time. The tracker use a Kalman Filter to predict movement estimation from past positions. You can use bounding boxes from any clustering or detection filter.

IntVectorProperty.name: ShowGhostTracks
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Show tracks currently not associated to a detection.

IntVectorProperty.name: ShowTracksPredictions
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Also show the predicted bbox of KF tracks.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: DistanceThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: The minimum distance required to match a track and a detection.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: DistanceCoefficients
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Distance formula: A × IoU + B × euclidean_distance + C × size_distance + D × rotation_distance.

IntVectorProperty.name: MaxLostCount
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: The number of frame a track can still exist without matching a detection.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Q
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: KalmanFilter process measure noise error covariance.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: R (position)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: KalmanFilter position measure noise error covariance.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: R (size)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: KalmanFilter size measure noise error covariance.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: R (theta)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: KalmanFilter z-orientation measure noise error covariance.
